$description: Woodfine org-chart extended colour tokens — IBM Carbon extension. IBM Carbon Warm Gray added to the Woodfine corporate palette. Tinted treatment: -70 border, -20 background fill. Additive-only — existing Material Design and Tailwind primitives in the core palette are unchanged. Companion CSS: components/nodes.css (token-warm-gray). Semantic roles: tokens/charts/token-chart-semantic.yaml. Master co-sign: command@claude-code 2026-06-01.

ibm-carbon-org-chart.$description: IBM Carbon primitive colour values consumed by Woodfine org-chart token classes

20.$description: IBM Carbon Warm Gray 20 — background fill for token-warm-gray nodes

70.$description: IBM Carbon Warm Gray 70 — border colour for token-warm-gray nodes

org-chart-extended.$description: Semantic org-chart token entries for the IBM Carbon colour extension. Each entry maps a CSS class name to its background and border primitives. Node geometry (210x110px, 10px padding, solid border, z-index 4) is defined in components/nodes.css.

background.$description: Warm Gray tinted node background — use for holding companies and passive holding entities above the main management layer
